title: Borrower
description: A developer/borrower doing business with HDC — the private, nonprofit, or joint-venture entity that borrows HDC bond + subsidy financing to build or preserve affordable housing, and that submits the Developer Intake Form. HDC has no structured borrower dataset; borrower identity is derivable only from the 'Applicant Name'/'Applicant Address' fields of HPD's LIHTC project-level datasets (the 4% deals financed through HDC). This schema models the borrower as a first-class party.

x-source.note: Borrower identity is derived from the 'Applicant Name' field of HPD's LIHTC 4% project-level dataset; HDC publishes no borrower directory.

mwbe.description: Minority/Women-Owned Business Enterprise designation, where known.

developments.description: Developments this borrower has financed with HDC (derived).
